title: alchemilla vulgaris f. glaucescens
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris f. glaucescens, also known as the glandular lady's mantle, is a subspecies of the lady's mantle plant that is characterized by its glaucous leaves. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris f. glaucescens include treating menstrual cramps, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wound healing and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla vulgaris f. glaucescens can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
